meta.title: 环境和天气变化
meta.description: Intermediate environmental vocabulary and expressions in Chinese: pollution, conservation, and climate change.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급 환경 어휘와 표현: 오염, 절약, 기후 변화.

questions.prompt: 「污染」是什么意思？(What does 污染 mean?)

explanation.en: 「环保」(huánbǎo) means "environmental protection" (short for 环境保护).

questions.prompt: 「环保」是什么意思？(What does 环保 mean?)
「气候变化」是什么意思？(What does 气候变化 mean?)
「节约」是什么意思？(What does 节约 mean?)
「垃圾分类」是什么意思？(What does 垃圾分类 mean?)
这条河曾经被___得很严重，现在已经变干净了。(This river was once severely polluted, but now it's clean.)
越来越多的人开始关注___，减少使用塑料袋。(More and more people are starting to care about environmental protection, reducing the use of plastic bags.)
科学家警告说___正在影响全球的天气。(Scientists warn that climate change is affecting weather worldwide.)
为了___用水，我们应该关紧水龙头。(In order to conserve water, we should turn off the tap tightly.)
我们小区最近开始实行___，垃圾要分开扔。(Our neighborhood recently started implementing garbage sorting, trash needs to be thrown away separately.)
最近几年，全球气温___了很多。(In recent years, global temperatures have risen a lot.)
为了保护环境，我们应该多___公共交通，少开车。(To protect the environment, we should use public transportation more, drive less.)
这个城市的空气质量最近变___了，因为工厂减少了排放。(This city's air quality has improved recently because factories reduced emissions.)

explanation.en: 「变得」(biàn de) means "to become", used before an adjective.
explanation.ko: 「变得」(biàn de)는 형용사 앞에서 '~하게 되다'라는 뜻으로 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 异常的天气___越来越常见，比如极端高温和暴雨。(Abnormal weather is becoming increasingly common, such as extreme heat and heavy rain.)
很多国家承诺要___碳排放，保护地球。(Many countries have pledged to reduce carbon emissions to protect the planet.)
使用可___能源，比如太阳能和风能，对环境更好。(Using renewable energy, such as solar and wind power, is better for the environment.)
过度___森林会破坏生态平衡。(Excessive deforestation will disrupt the ecological balance.)
塑料垃圾对海洋生物造成了很大的___。(Plastic waste causes great harm to marine life.)

explanation.en: 「可重复使用的」(kě chóngfù shǐyòng de) means "reusable".
explanation.ko: 「可重复使用的」(kě chóngfù shǐyòng de)는 '재사용 가능한'이라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 政府正在推广___购物袋，减少塑料垃圾。(The government is promoting reusable shopping bags to reduce plastic waste.)

explanation.en: 「出一份力」(chū yí fèn lì) means "to contribute one's effort".
explanation.ko: 「出一份力」(chū yí fèn lì)는 '힘을 보태다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 每个人都应该为环境保护___自己的一份力。(Everyone should contribute their own effort to environmental protection.)

explanation.en: 「被」is needed to mark the passive voice, since the river is the receiver of pollution: 被污染 (not just 污染 alone).
explanation.ko: 강이 오염 행위의 대상이므로 수동을 나타내는 「被」가 필요하며 '被污染'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这条河曾经污染得很严重，现在已经变干净了。(This river was once severely polluted.) — find the error
choices: 这条河曾经被污染得很严重，现在已经变干净了。
这条河曾经污染得很严重，现在已经变干净了。
这条河曾经很严重污染得，现在已经变干净了。
这条河污染曾经得很严重，现在已经变干净了。

explanation.en: 「水龙头」(faucet) is a fixed compound where 水 comes before 龙头; 龙头水 reverses the correct order.
explanation.ko: 「水龙头」는 '水'가 '龙头' 앞에 오는 고정 합성어이며 '龙头水'는 어순이 틀렸다.

questions.prompt: 为了节约用水，我们应该关紧龙头水。(In order to conserve water, we should turn off the tap tightly.) — find the error
choices: 为了节约用水，我们应该关紧水龙头。
为了节约用水，我们应该关紧龙头水。
为了节约用水，我们应该紧关水龙头。
为了节约用水，我们水龙头应该关紧。

explanation.en: The verb 减少 (reduce) must come before its object 碳排放 (carbon emissions): 减少碳排放 (not 碳排放减少).
explanation.ko: 동사 '减少'는 목적어 '碳排放' 앞에 와야 하므로 '减少碳排放'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 很多国家承诺要碳排放减少，保护地球。(Many countries have pledged to reduce carbon emissions.) — find the error
choices: 很多国家承诺要减少碳排放，保护地球。
很多国家承诺要碳排放减少，保护地球。
很多国家碳排放承诺要减少，保护地球。
很多国家承诺碳排放要减少，保护地球。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这条河曾经被污染得很严重，现在已经变干净了 ("This river was once severely polluted, but now it's clean").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这条河曾经被污染得很严重，现在已经变干净了' (이 강은 예전에 심각하게 오염되었지만 지금은 깨끗해졌다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这条河曾经__________，现在已经变干净了。(This river was once severely polluted, but now it's clean.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 很多国家承诺要减少碳排放，保护地球 ("Many countries have pledged to reduce carbon emissions to protect the planet").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '很多国家承诺要减少碳排放，保护地球' (많은 나라가 탄소 배출을 줄여 지구를 보호하겠다고 약속했다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 很多国家承诺要__________，保护地球。(Many countries have pledged to reduce carbon emissions to protect the planet.)
